SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 08
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR

JUDGE JAMES MCKECHNIE 3:23 PM C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. IN CHAMBERS, CASE SETTLED. TERMS READ ON THE RECORD AS FOLLOWS: JUDGMENT FOR THE PLTF, & AGAINST DEFTS FOR POSS- ESSION OF THE PREMISES. WRIT MAY ISSUE BUT EVICTION STAYED UNTIL 9/6/93 5PM. RENT DUE IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,980 IS EXONERATED THRU 9/6/93 PROVIDED DEFTS VACATE PREMISES. NEUTRAL REFERENCE TO DEFTS BY PLTF. RETURN OF SECURITY DEPOSIT ON VACATION OF PREMISES NOT LATER THAN 9/5/93. IF CONDITIONS NOT MET, JUDGMENT FOR THE PLTF & AGAINST DEFTS FOR POSS OF THE PREM. MONEY WITH COSTS/FEES, LESS SECURITY DEPOSIT. PLTF. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRICE, LYNEICE A D'ALEESSANDRO, LEE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2362 22ND AV #3, SF 94116, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEF DOES NOT VAC PLT MAY FILE EX PARTE FOR MONEY JUD OF $2110 TOT & FOR W/P.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
